title: bad BAT properties with binary copy into and NULL values
poc: select * from "noNULLint" where x is null;
select * from "noNULLint" where x is not null;

key_bug_features: bad BAT properties with NULL values in binary copy
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "testTable" (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM "testTable" WHERE value IS NULL;
